name: @gonext/blocks-core
description: Core block registrations for GoNext — paragraph, heading, list, image, quote, code, separator, spacer, columns, group. Each block ships a BlockTypeDefinition (with JSON Schema attributes), an Edit React component, a Save serializer, and a server-render hint consumed by the Go block render walker. Authors of plugin blocks should treat these definitions as the reference implementation. Apache-2.0.

scripts.build: echo '@gonext/blocks-core: source-only package, no build step'
